Car_TV.description: Number of families that have both a car and a TV set.

Car_NoTV.description: Number of families that have a car but no TV set.

NoCar_TV.description: Number of families that have a TV set but no car.

NoCar_NoTV.description: Number of families that have neither a TV set nor a car.

Total_families.description: Total number of families surveyed in the community.
